title: 24] To consider the nominations of: Vice Admiral...
description: Full Committee Hearing on June 24, 2025 at 5:30 AM
text:
Full Committee Hearing
To consider the nominations of: Vice Admiral Charles B. Cooper II, USN to be admiral and Commander, United States Central Command; and Lieutenant General Alexus G. Grynkewich, USAF to be general and Commander, United States European Command and Supreme Allied Commander, Europe
